name: Hamilton Insurance Group, Ltd.
business: Hamilton Insurance Group is a global specialty insurance and reinsurance company that sells insurance and reinsurance products in property, casualty, and specialty lines. It operates through three platforms: Hamilton Global Specialty (medium to large accounts), Hamilton Select (small to mid-sized clients in the U.S. E&S market), and Hamilton Re (reinsurance globally).

exposures.sentence: We are a global specialty insurance and reinsurance company founded in Bermuda in 2013.

We face significant cybersecurity risks, including cybersecurity attacks and security breaches, and other incidents that may affect our information technology systems and those of our service providers.
The use or anticipated use of AI technologies, including generative AI, by us or third parties, may increase or create new operational, legal and reputational risks.

catalysts.event: Lloyd's approves Syndicate 4000 capacity for 2026 at £657 million
catalysts.sentence: The 2026 syndicate business forecast approved by Lloyd s gives Syndicate 4000 capacity of 657 million.
